data.name: ACL Rehabilitation Protocol
data.primaryGoal: Restore full knee function and return to sport (LSI ≥ 90%)

phases.phaseObjective: Reduce inflammation, protect healing tissue, gentle ROM exercises

exercises.description: Perform Treadmill Walk with controlled movement
Perform Quad Sets with controlled movement
Perform Library Exercise with controlled movement
Perform Static Stretching with controlled movement
